title: JsonWebKey
description: An EC P-256 public key in JWK format (RFC 7517).

x.description: Base64url-encoded x coordinate of the EC public key.

y.description: Base64url-encoded y coordinate of the EC public key.

use.description: Public key use. 'sig' for signature, 'enc' for encryption.

key_ops.description: Key operations. Identifies the operations the key is intended for.

alg.description: Algorithm. Must be 'ES256' for P-256 curve signing.

kid.description: Key ID (§4.5). Arbitrary string used to match a specific key.

x5u.description: X.509 URL (§4.6). URI pointing to an X.509 public key certificate or chain.

x5c.description: X.509 certificate chain (§4.7). Array of base64-encoded (not base64url) DER PKIX certificates.

x5t.description: X.509 SHA-1 thumbprint (§4.8). Base64url-encoded SHA-1 digest of the DER encoding of the certificate.

x5t#S256.description: X.509 SHA-256 thumbprint (§4.9). Base64url-encoded SHA-256 digest of the DER encoding of the certificate.
